name: Project Codename
description: Executive reporting dashboard for project visibility and milestone tracking

milestones.name: Foundation & Architecture
milestones.description: Core infrastructure, data models, and service layer established

milestones.name: Dashboard UI & Components
milestones.description: Blazor components, styling, and executive dashboard layout

milestones.name: Integration & Testing
milestones.description: End-to-end testing, performance optimization, and deployment hardening

milestones.name: Production Release
milestones.description: Final validation, documentation, and production deployment

workItems.title: DataProvider service implementation
workItems.description: Read, parse, validate, and cache project data from data.json with error handling

workItems.title: DashboardLayout component
workItems.description: Main layout component hosting all dashboard sections with responsive grid

workItems.title: MilestoneTimeline visualization
workItems.description: Horizontal timeline component displaying milestone status with color coding

workItems.title: ProjectMetrics KPI display
workItems.description: Health indicators, completion percentage, and velocity metrics component

workItems.title: WorkItemSummary component
workItems.description: Three-column layout for work items grouped by status (Shipped, In Progress, Carried Over)

workItems.title: CSS styling and screenshot optimization
workItems.description: Print/screenshot-optimized CSS with Pico framework for executive dashboard appearance

workItems.title: Unit test coverage for services
workItems.description: Comprehensive xUnit tests for DataProvider and caching logic with >85% coverage

workItems.title: Integration testing and deployment
workItems.description: End-to-end testing, self-contained executable build, and deployment documentation
